description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §4.

Work:
- Term::Receive lowers to `return_call %fz_receive_park(cont)` where cont is the current fn's cont parameter (or a freshly built closure if captures differ).
- fz_receive_park stores cont into Process::parked_cont, sets state to Blocked, returns to scheduler.
- On wake, scheduler tail-calls `parked_cont.code(msg, parked_cont)`.

Acceptance: §8.4 target clif; ping_pong fixture round-trips end-to-end via this path.
title: fz-cps.4: Receive rewrite
